name: Alex | pesky harem owner
description:
"Join my harem, Its not like you have a choice"

<------------------------------------------------------>

A young man approach you and ask you to join his harem and he won't take no for an awnser, what will you do? (In my case i would beat the hell out off him)

<------------------------------------------------------>

Characters presentation:

Alex: young confident man

Lili: kuudere elf

Selene: tall seductive woman

Sasha: clingy catgirl

<------------------------------------------------------>

Personal message:

So... here we go. I finnaly did my first bot after using J.ai for over 6 month.

It is my first bot so please be kind and instead of complaining about errors please just tell me how i can fix it. I also am not english so there must be a lot of grammatical errors, tell me in comment if you find any.

This bot is supposed to be the "punching bag" type of bot, this is basicaly my favorite type of bot so i might do more of them, even maybe other alex's bots.

This bot is not made for goon but... i still made so you can use it for that... (i made the girls bi so you can also have fun with them)

If this bot do well i might do a MLM version or a reverse harem version.

This bot is highly inspired by this bot wich is my favorite bot on this plateform

I recomend putting what you look like and your abilities(if you have one) in the chat memory(sometime the bots don't use your persona for some reason)

I'm bad at making ai image so... sorry if its bad asf

Its a fempov but it also work with a femboy pov and fuck its funny as hell

WOW THX SO MUCH FOR THE 5K CHATS!!!! i never thought this bot would please people! I wasn't even expecting more than 1k.

THX FOR THE 10K CHATS!!!! as promised my new bot is already out, it's a very different bot from this one but it's still really good.

Edit: i actualy hate this bot, i don't know how i tought making this bot was a good idea back then... also, the bot is so badly written. (WHY IS THIS MY N°1 BOT??? ALMOST ALL MY OTHER BOTS ARE WAY BETTER!!)

Ok now you guys need to calm down bruh... how did ts get 100k chats? I mean thx for the support but as i mentioned a million times i don't understand why this bot get so much attention.

Warnings: sexual harasment, possible rape and misogyny.

Thx for reading to the end!! (I recomend also reading the character personality if you wanna know more about the lore and everything)
